title: Oldschool Legacy Ores
description: Restores the classic, old-school ore textures in place of the modern designs.
body:
**Legacy Ores** brings back Minecraft’s classic ore textures, replacing the modern redesigned ores with their original, nostalgic look. Each ore is redrawn to match the old chunky patterns and familiar colors, giving caves and terrain a retro feel while keeping the game clean and playable.

_This texture pack does not include old ore items textures._

**Join our Discord below to get notified for updates or releases.**

[Discord link](https://discord.gg/hU2Z62Ng7t)
